name: 1b-benchmarker-final-lintcheck
command: pnpm --filter oando-site exec eslint --format compact features/planner/admin/svg-editor/AdminSvgEditorEditView.tsx features/planner/admin/svg-editor/svgPipelineRunner.ts features/planner/open3d/catalog/svg/svgCompiler.server.ts 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern 'error|warning|AdminSvg|svgPipeline' | Select -First 8; echo 'LINT_1B_FILES_CHECK_DONE'
